mapper.sql: id, code, sn, terminal_type, terminal_ip, workstation_id, bound_station_ids, online, current_operator, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO qc_terminal (id, code, sn, terminal_type, terminal_ip, workstation_id, bound_station_ids, online, current_operator, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{code}, #{sn}, #{terminalType}, #{terminalIp}, #{workstationId}, CAST(#{boundStationIds, typeHandler=com.zioneer.robotqcsystem.mapper.typehandler.JsonStringListTypeHandler} AS jsonb), #{online}, #{currentUser}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
